name: Ahmed Maher
title: Flutter Team Lead
summary: Flutter Developer with 5+ years building and leading cross-platform mobile apps, and a prior 15-year career in Oil & Gas as a Data Engineer. Specialized in E-commerce, Booking, and Business apps — published and maintained 30+ apps on Google Play and the App Store.

bullets: Lead the Flutter team and deliver multiple production apps.
Built and launched large-scale e-commerce and gaming apps.
Mentored developers and improved team workflow with Git & Trello.
Developed and maintained mobile apps for retail and logistics.
Delivered Stock Client and Stock Delivery (Android/iOS).
Improved performance with responsive UI and optimized APIs.

experience.location: Egypt · Qatar · KSA · Spain · Ghana · Kuwait · Iraq · Malaysia
bullets: Designed, managed, and analyzed large datasets for oilfield operations.
Contributed to multinational projects with Halliburton and partners.
